channel.title: Watch on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Watch on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: k8s: Announcing etcd v3.7.0
item.description:
etcd v3.7.0 adds RangeStream for chunked range results, improves range/lease/watch performance, and completes the move off legacy v2store dependencies. It also includes protobuf dependency cleanup, Unix socket support, new metrics, and several upgrade-breaking removals.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog

item.title: k8s: Kubernetes v1.36: Server-Side Sharded List and Watch
item.description:
Kubernetes v1.36 adds server-side sharded list and watch as an alpha feature. The API server can now filter list/watch results by a shard selector so each controller replica receives only the objects in its assigned hash range, reducing duplicate network and deserialization work.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog
